Weather application implementation for Pebble devices, including layout, splash screen, and warning dialog.


## Files
- **[weather_app.c](weather_app.c.md)**: Implements a weather application for Pebble devices, handling weather data display and user interactions.
- **[weather_app.h](weather_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information about the weather app in Pebble firmware.
- **[weather_app_layout.c](weather_app_layout.c.md)**: Implements the layout and rendering logic for a weather application on the Pebble smartwatch, including animations and icon management.
- **[weather_app_layout.h](weather_app_layout.h.md)**: Defines the WeatherAppLayout structure and functions for initializing, setting data, and animating it.
- **[weather_app_splash_screen.c](weather_app_splash_screen.c.md)**: Implements a splash screen for the weather app with a logo and a timeout feature.
- **[weather_app_splash_screen.h](weather_app_splash_screen.h.md)**: Function declaration for displaying the weather app splash screen with a specified timeout.
- **[weather_app_warning_dialog.c](weather_app_warning_dialog.c.md)**: Implements a warning dialog for the weather app with callback functionality upon dismissal.
- **[weather_app_warning_dialog.h](weather_app_warning_dialog.h.md)**: Defines a weather app warning dialog using an expandable dialog and a dismissal callback.
